offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing through spreadsheets.
problem: Timely invoicing for cash flow management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on invoicing
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try scheduled invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
